items.name: Single Sock
items.flavor: Its partner is out there somewhere. Probably thriving.

items.name: Single Sock (Fancy)
items.flavor: Embroidered with initials you don't recognize.

items.name: Single Sock (Mythic Pairmate)
items.flavor: You swear you hear a faint whisper: 'Find them…'

items.name: Lost Diary Page
items.flavor: Reads: 'Day 14: Still no snacks.'

items.name: Tearstained Diary Page
items.flavor: The ink is smudged. The emotions are not.

items.name: Diary Page (Final Entry)
items.flavor: You shouldn't read this. You read it anyway.

items.name: Crumpled Memo
items.flavor: Subject: MANDATORY FUN. The irony is not lost on you.

items.name: Crumpled Memo (Angry Reply)
items.flavor: Someone wrote 'NO.' in red marker. Twice.

items.name: Crumpled Memo (The Original Email Chain)
items.flavor: Contains 47 replies. All passive-aggressive.

items.name: Old Photograph
items.flavor: A smiling family. You hope they're okay.

items.name: Old Photograph (Torn)
items.flavor: Half the people are missing. Symbolic.

items.name: Old Photograph (Perfect Condition)
items.flavor: The colors are impossibly vivid. You feel watched.

items.name: Embarrassing Photo
items.flavor: You don't remember taking this. You wish you didn't.

items.name: Embarrassing Photo (Signed)
items.flavor: Signed by someone who definitely regrets it.

items.name: Embarrassing Photo (Viral Edition)
items.flavor: This photo ruined someone's career. Maybe yours.

items.name: Child's Drawing
items.flavor: A stick figure holding hands with a robot. Heartwarming.

items.name: Child's Drawing (Crayon Masterpiece)
items.flavor: The sun has sunglasses. Peak art.

items.name: Child's Drawing (Prophetic)
items.flavor: Depicts events that haven't happened yet.

items.name: Unsent Love Letter
items.flavor: The handwriting shakes. The feelings don't.

items.name: Returned Love Letter
items.flavor: Stamped 'NO THANK YOU.' Brutal.

items.name: Love Letter (Sealed Forever)
items.flavor: You feel the emotions radiating through the envelope.

items.name: Old Wallet
items.flavor: Contains expired IDs and a coupon for free fries.

items.name: Fancy Wallet
items.flavor: Smells like leather and bad decisions.

items.name: Wallet of Infinite Receipts
items.flavor: Every time you open it, there's a new receipt.

items.name: Generic Keychain
items.flavor: Says 'World's #4 Dad.'

items.name: ARC Logo Keychain
items.flavor: Corporate pride never dies. Even when everything else does.

items.name: Keychain of Destiny
items.flavor: You feel strangely important holding it.

items.name: Concert Ticket Stub
items.flavor: The band name is smudged. Probably for the best.

items.name: Movie Ticket Stub
items.flavor: The movie was rated 12%. You understand why.

items.name: Ticket Stub (Final Show)
items.flavor: The date is impossible. The event never happened.

items.name: Small Stuffed Animal
items.flavor: Missing an eye. Still adorable.

items.name: Worn Stuffed Animal
items.flavor: Loved too much. Lost too soon.

items.name: Stuffed Animal (Sentient?)
items.flavor: You swear it blinked.

items.name: Broken Phone
items.flavor: Screen shattered. Battery swollen. Memories intact.

items.name: ARC Employee Phone
items.flavor: Locked behind a password: 'password123'.

items.name: Phone of Infinite Notifications
items.flavor: It vibrates constantly. No messages appear.

items.name: Old Journal
items.flavor: Half the pages are blank. The other half are worse.

items.name: ARC Research Journal
items.flavor: Filled with diagrams and ominous doodles.

items.name: Journal of Forbidden Knowledge
items.flavor: You read one sentence and immediately regret it.
